cat > /tmp/verify.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

# Function to check if function/struct exists at approximately the right lines
check_location() {
    local file=$1
    local item=$2
    local start_line=$3
    local end_line=$4
    
    if [ ! -f "$file" ]; then
        echo "✗ File not found: $file"
        return 1
    fi
    
    # Search within range or nearby
    if grep -q "$item" "$file"; then
        actual_line=$(grep -n "$item" "$file" | head -1 | cut -d: -f1)
        diff=$((actual_line > start_line ? actual_line - start_line : start_line - actual_line))
        if [ $diff -le 5 ]; then
            echo "✓ $file: $item found at line ~$actual_line (claimed $start_line)"
        else
            echo "~ $file: $item found at line $actual_line (claimed $start_line, off by $diff)"
        fi
    else
        echo "✗ $file: $item not found"
    fi
}

BASE="/Users/muness1/src/hiphi-repos/unified-hifi-control"

echo "=== VERIFICATION REPORT ==="
echo ""

echo "1. volume.rs - VolumeControlsCompact at 88-92"
check_location "$BASE/src/app/components/volume.rs" "VolumeControlsCompact" 52 52

echo ""
